steps.t: Bingo wanted to meet you at the western side of the Bridge of Khazad-dûm, in Nud-melek.
Bingo is at the western side of the Bridge of Khazad-dûm.
Bingo is ready to see the sunlight once again, and wants to meet you in the Dimrill Dale. The exit from Moria is east of the First Hall, in Nud-melek.
Bingo is outside the East-gate of Moria, in Nanduhirion.
Spalvi has fallen behind, and stands by the East-gate of Moria, in Nanduhirion.
Bingo is outside the East-gate of Moria, in Nanduhirion.
